Linux live proof (worktree backend :8899, real codex 0.142.5 launch): HEALTHY pane tree sh→bash(launch.sh)→node(codex CLI)→codex(vendored), pane_current_command=bash → liveness online. FAILED (TUI killed, pane at bare shell, shared app-server sock still bound) → offline inside AND past boot-grace. Fresh launch read starting. Claude session liveness unaffected (online via rendezvous sock). Unit tests cover the same shapes (harness.test.ts).
pre-fix: thread/start without config.bypass_hook_trust → app-server discovers no local hooks on the untrusted worktree → 0 dispatch events, no Stop gate. Bypass-on-app-server-invocation was inert.

fix: codexStartThread sends config.bypass_hook_trust=true on thread/start (gated on flag support) → app-server force-enables the untrusted worktree layer → SessionStart+UserPromptSubmit+Stop all fire through dispatch.sh. App-server started with NO CLI bypass flag, proving it inert.

pre-fix: bypass sent, but worktree lacks .codex anchor + project trust + per-hook hashes → 0 dispatch events, frozen session.json, no Session trailer (fixture ed10169b + app-server 'disabled until trusted')

post-fix: anchor + project trust + per-hook hashes established by materialize → SessionStart..Stop fire through dispatch.sh, session.json advances to asking, commit carries Session: trailer (record id via CODEX_THREAD_ID alias). Verified on real fresh-init dispatch (worker 91fb0fed).

Reproduced github#30 on Ubuntu (fs.protected_regular=2, sticky root /tmp), codex 0.137.0: default-derived sock = bare /tmp/spexcode-cx-<hash>.sock; 'codex app-server --listen unix://<sock>' dies EPERM (os error 1), client connect() gets ENOENT — the launch.sh retry-forever symptom. Control: same codex + same filename in an owned 0700 subdir binds OK.

Post-fix: codexAppServerSock defaults to owned per-uid 0700 subdir (/tmp/spexcode-cx-1000). Same host/hardening/codex 0.137.0 as the fail reading: 'codex app-server --listen unix://<derived>' binds OK and the client connect() is accepted. SPEXCODE_CODEX_SOCKET_DIR override retained; 25/25 harness tests + full suite (116) green.

Re-measured at 72186b22 on live hardened host (fs.protected_regular=2, sticky root /tmp), codex 0.137.0: real codexAppServerSock() derives /tmp/spexcode-cx-1000/… (owned 0700 subdir), codex app-server binds it and connect() is accepted, no env knob; bare-/tmp control still EPERM os-error-1 + ENOENT (github#30 shape).

stock-hardened host (fs.protected_regular=2, root sticky /tmp), codex 0.137.0, no env override: default-derived sock (/tmp/spexcode-cx-1000/spexcode-cx-<hash>.sock, owned 0700 per-uid subdir) binds and accepts connect out of the box; CONTROL bare-/tmp bind fails exactly as github#30 ('Error: Operation not permitted (os error 1)', no socket); CONTROL owned subdir binds fine — the fix lives in the derivation and holds.

Honest re-measure via a REAL dispatched codex worker (codex-cli 0.137.0, gpt-5.5, session ee6a89cc, thread 019f39c4-856b): live apply_patch round-trip — payload tool_name:apply_patch with bare '*** Update File: spec-cli/src/harness.ts' envelope (no file_path/token); spec-checked sentinel + spec-of-file-seen ledger (the edited path) both landed in the GOVERNED record's store dir via the thread-id→harness_session_id alias (no phantom thread-id dir); mark-active flipped active, done/park/ask and the Session commit trailer all attributed to the record id. Probe session closed after measuring.

Real codex worker on the project app-server: (a) spex session send while 'sleep 90' ran mid-turn → 'sent', pane rendered the message and the model acknowledged it WHILE the sleep still ran; turn-id proof of turn/steer — the steer's UserPromptSubmit carries the SAME turn_id (019f39c4-865f) as the original prompt, and ZANZIBAR + the remaining steps completed in that same turn. (b) idle send → landed as a NEW turn (019f39c7-dbb1 = turn/start). (c) tmux kill-session → liveness offline; spex session reopen → relaunch ran 'codex --remote …resume 019f39c4-856b' (same owned thread), prior conversation fully rendered (STEER text, ZANZIBAR, IDLE-PING, commit report), harness_session_id unchanged.

Real launch, three shapes: HEALTHY read online with pane_current_command=bash (wrapper) and codex/node in the pane's DESCENDANT tree (bash→launch.sh→node codex.js→vendored codex) — a foreground-name probe would false-read it offline; FAILED (TUI tree killed, pane at bare idle shell, 0 descendants) read OFFLINE while the shared app-server sock stayed BOUND (ss: LISTEN …955e….sock pid 3657125) — sock-presence would false-read online; BOOTING read liveness 'starting' in the create response, never offline during boot. Authored 'asking' display retained while liveness went offline (waiting-on-human status is display-preserved).

Real dashboard/app-server dispatch (spex new --launcher codex, backend-owned thread on the shared per-project app-server, cwd=linked worktree, --dangerously-bypass-hook-trust): full lifecycle fired through dispatch.sh — SessionStart 23:30:08, UserPromptSubmit :09, PreToolUse/PostToolUse across the turn (incl. apply_patch), Stop 23:33:01 — with NO interactive hooks-review wedge on the persistent resume (anchor+trust+hashes in place). session.json advanced launch→active→awaiting('probe complete')→asking (Stop gate BLOCKED an undeclared stop and forced re-declaration — the codex stderr block path works); commit c9e2b3d3 carries 'Session: ee6a89cc-…' (record id via the harness_session_id alias at commit time). Traced via a temporary append-only dispatch.sh log line, reverted after; probe session closed, worktree+branch swept.

re-measure on the pid birth-registration mechanism: kill -9 of registered TUI pid → offline in 127ms while the shared app-server socket still exists AND accepts connect (old false-online trap gone); ps fallback never ran

re-measure through the new sh-c/exec launch wrapper: mark-active flipped active on tool use, Stop declared asking with note, apply_patch fired spec-of-file ledger, record aliased via harness_session_id

Hardened host (fs.protected_regular=2, root sticky /tmp). Default-derived sock = owned per-uid 0700 subdir /tmp/spexcode-cx-1000/: codex app-server BINDS + client connect() OK, no env knob. CONTROL bare-/tmp sock: codex fails 'Operation not permitted (os error 1)' — exactly github#30. Fix (owned subdir default) confirmed live.
